results.rendered_html: paṭaha m. (rarely n. or f(ī). ) a kettledrum, a war-drum, drum, tabor (acc. with √dā, or Caus. of √dā or √bhram, to proclaim anything by the sound of a drum),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
paṭaha m.n. gaṇa ardharcādi zu  P. 2,4,31 .  SIDDH. K. 251,b,5 .
1〉 m.n. (nur das m. zu belegen) Trommel, Pauke  AK. 1,1,7,6 . 2,8,2,76 . 3,4,1,3 .  TRIK. 1,1,119 . 3,3,82 .  H. 294 . 799 . an. 3,768 .  MED. h. 19 .  HALĀY. 1,97 . 5,55 .  MBH. 6,110 .  R. 4,38,34 . 6,19,14 .  SUŚR. 2,276,9 .  BHARTṚ. 3,73 .  RAGH. 9,71 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 42 (43), 59 .  PAÑCAT. 20,8 . avādayanta paṭahān  DEV. 2,54 . bhramaya kṛtsne 'tra pure ˚ghoṣaṇām  KATHĀS. 24,50 . bhramayāmāsa paṭaham 52. ˚bhramaṇa 26,92 . ˚prodghoṣaṇā 24,231 . sarvatra paṭahaśabdena ghoṣaṇamājñāpayāmāsa  PAÑCAT. 261,7 . 56,8 . nagare paṭaho dāpitaḥ 6. ˚ghoṣaka  KATHĀS. 26,95 . aghoṣyata sarvatra paṭahānantaraṃ vacaḥ 24,54 . 232 . dattvā paṭahaghoṣaṇām 33,148 . ghoṣyamāṇaṃ sapaṭahaṃ pure tasminnidaṃ vacaḥ 26,93 .  VID. 253 . vadhya˚  MṚCCH. 84,2 . 172,20 . vivāha˚ 21. kurvansaṃdhyābalipaṭahatāṃ śūlinaḥ  MEGH. 35 . Vgl. yaśaḥ˚.
— 2〉 m. das Beginnen, Unternehmen (ārambha, samārambha)  TRIK. 3,3,458 .  H. an.   MED.   ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 3〉 m. das Beschädigen, Verletzen (hiṃsana)  ŚABDAR.
